title: 導きの標となりしは智

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Sei! Yah! Hyah! Tah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Forty-five! Forty-six! Forty-seven!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Don't go easy on me today!
choice_data_list: Let's start with a paced run.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes, Trainer... Actually, if I may be so bold, I
would like to stay and train some more on my
own.
choice_data_list:
All right. Remember to give me a summary of
your exercises later.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Duly noted. Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(I have yet to obtain an obsession... and it
remains unclear how to develop one.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(But it's more than likely an obsession driving
Chiyono O and Ardan to run beyond their limits.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(If that's the case, I may be able to have an
obsession myself by pushing harder...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Right now, what I need to do is simply push
myself to the extreme!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stop by the track on my way home after work. As
I thought, Yaeno Muteki is still running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she's heeding my warning and doing her
best not to push herself too far, I can't say I like
what I'm seeing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can practically feel the mental strain she's under
as if it were my own anxiety. It might be wise to
shift her focus to something different.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, it's packed in here! There's still loads of
time until the main event starts, though.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I mean, are you really surprised? This autumn
Tenno Sho could be one to go down in history!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having invited Yaeno Muteki to watch the
autumn Tenno Sho today, we're currently waiting
for the race to start.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Who do you think's gonna win? Personally, I'm
betting on Tamamo Cross!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Nah, it's Oguri Cap for sure! Don't you want to
see her take her first G1 title?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The sheer amount of attention surrounding
Tamamo and Oguri is mind-blowing.
choice_data_list:
They're saying this race will decide the peak of
racing.

They're saying this race will decide the peak of
racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is going to be a head-to-head duel between
Tamamo Cross and Oguri Cap, who have both
been on the rise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The rivalry between them is quite similar to the
relationship Yaeno Muteki has with Sakura
Chiyono O and Mejiro Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I invited Yaeno to watch the race in the hopes
that she might gain a hint on how to navigate her
own plight.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
There might come a day when I face off against
them. I shall use this chance to study them
intently.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Squeee! Oguri! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross! Give us another blowout victory!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The enthusiasm is so palpable it's fusing into the
air itself!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But how are Tamamo and Oguri faring within this
maelstrom of feverish excitement?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Talk about a perfect arena, huh, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Here's where we settle the ultimate question,
once and for all.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Which of us is da best there is!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I've never put much thought into being "the best."

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I want to beat you. I will beat you, plain and simple.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Oguri seems different from how she was at the
Mainichi Hai.)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They've crossed the 200-meter mark! Currently in
the lead is Tamamo Cross! It's neck and neck
between Oguri Cap and Tamamo Cross!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna tear right past da finish line! Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Now's my chance! Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's in hot pursuit! Holding on to her
lead, Tamamo Cross picks up speed! Tamamo
Cross makes a run for it!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Come on, come ooon! I gotta beat Tama!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is short by just a hair's breadth!
Tamamo Cross wins! First place goes to Tamamo
Cross!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Haha! I did it! I won!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ngh... I won't lose next time!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Say what? Does that mean you're askin' for a
rematch?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. No matter how many times it takes, I'll beat
you!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit. Come at me however many times
ya like!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oguri's obsession is...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: To beat Tamamo.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I see.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nothing... Watching this match gave me a
lot to think about. With the Osaka Hai coming
up, I have to work just as hard as these two.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki smiles at me, but I also feel a hint
of somberness from her. Is it just my imagination?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Obsession...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(I assumed Oguri was free from the chains of
obsession due to her calm demeanor.)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. No matter how many times it takes, I'll beat
you!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (Without a doubt, she has an obsession.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Her feelings may not contain the rage of a
wildfire, but they came through straight as a
loosed arrow.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(And not just Oguri. Chiyono O as well. And
Ardan.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(They've all refined their desire to accomplish
their goals into pure obsession.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (I'm the only one who's falling behind!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer said I can become stronger even without
an obsession.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But to think that the divide between myself and
those who have one could be this vast...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to yield victory to them. I want the
strength to fell great opponents and show my
grandparents how much I've improved!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: These raging emotions are right here in my heart!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
So what am I lacking in order to have my own
obsession?!
